metadata.title: Produce a blueprint design document for repo_refactor, but blocked due to insufficient inputs.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a blueprint design document for repo_refactor, but blocked due to insufficient inputs.
mission.success_definition: All required fields present and validated; no ambiguous or contradictory statements.

in_scope.item: Undefined until missing inputs are provided.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: All required fields present and validated; no ambiguous or contradictory statements.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.problem_statement: Produce a blueprint design document for repo_refactor, but blocked due to insufficient inputs.

objectives.item: Produce a blueprint design document for repo_refactor, but blocked due to insufficient inputs.

requirements.item: Undefined until missing inputs are provided.

acceptance_criteria.item: All required fields present and validated; no ambiguous or contradictory statements.

implementation_plan.item: Undefined until missing inputs are provided.

validation_plan.item: A JSON artifact with artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, and compiled_intent containing Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Missing required inputs: no repo name, no current architecture description, no refactoring goals, no stakeholder list, no risk assessment. Urgent language and ambiguous acceptance criteria cannot be resolved without these. Unsafe to proceed.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
